title: Trapping of noctuids in vegetable production
subtitle: Lepkefélék csapdázása a zöldségtermesztésben
description: A guide detailing the use of CapTrap Funnel pheromone traps for monitoring noctuid moths and other pests in open-field and greenhouse vegetable production. It highlights how pheromone attractiveness and real-time data analysis through the CapTrap platform support effective integrated pest management decisions.
